title: image: rework parent/child/history matching
body: Rework our expectations of how images that are derived from each other look, so that we don't assume that an image that's derived from a base image always adds layers relative to that base image.

The test failures are container-selinux AVCs with a recent runc, we'll need a rebase once we land a fixed version in the test VMs (probably later this afternoon or early tomorrow)
Needs a rebase to get the SELinux fixes.
